The '''''Celestial''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] that malfunctioned, and found itself in the [[otherspace]] dimension.

==Appearances==
*[[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']] {{1st}}
*''[[Otherspace II: Invasion]]''
